responses: Hello! Welcome to Akshaya Institute of Technology 😊
Akshaya Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, is a reputed engineering college with modern infrastructure, experienced faculty and focus on quality education and student development.

📊 Total Intake Seats:

🎓 UG Programs:
Computer Science Engineering – 180
Electronics and Communication Engineering – 120
Information Science Engineering – 60
Artificial Intelligence and Data Science – 60
Agricultural Engineering – 60
Mechanical Engineering – 60
Total Intake: 540

🎓 PG Programs:
MTech in Computer Science Engineering – 18
MTech in VLSI Design – 18
MBA – 60
Admissions are through KCET (CET Code: E191), COMEDK or management quota. You can apply online or visit the college.
The fee ranges between 50000 to 150000 per year depending on the course.

📊 Placement Details (2025-26):

💰 Highest Package: 12 LPA
💰 Lowest Package: 2.5 LPA

🎓 ECE Department:
Planet (9–12 LPA): Rakshak
Ocean Link (5.75 LPA): Sachin Kumar B, Abhilash D R, Sandeep Ashok
Cloud Built (5.4 LPA): Sushma H M, Geeta Jagadish Malali
NxtSync (5.4 LPA): Vamshi P R

The campus provides modern laboratories, smart classrooms, library, WiFi, hostels, transportation, sports facilities and cafeteria.
